CARE & MAINTENANCE

Avoid pr
Avoid prolonged exposure to moisture as this can damage the material.
Wipe clean with a damp cloth as needed.
Wrinkles will appear in the leather with use. This is part of its beauty!
This leather is delicate and can scratch easily. Treat them with love!
